translation.sentence: ❌ You shall set a username for using the bot.
**ERROR** ❌ You are not authorized to use the bot.

**MAIN MENU** Hi {name}, welcome to the **Telegram Video Repurpose Bot**.
👉 Use the buttons below to interact with the bot
ℹ️ You can show this message at any moment by typing /help
**📝 BOT CONFIGURATION** Select the configuration type:
**⚙️ FILTER CONFIGURATION** Select the filter type:
**⚙️ FILTER CONFIGURATION** Select the __{filter_name}__ filter parameter:
**⚙️ FILTER CONFIGURATION** Set the value of the parameter __{param_name}__ for filter __{filter_name}__:
**⚙️ FILTER CONFIGURATION** Current status of filter __{filter_name}__: **{curr_status}**

**⚙️ FILTER CONFIGURATION** Current value(s) of parameter __{param_name}__ for filter __{filter_name}__: **{param_val}**
__Accepted range:__ **{param_lim}**
Enter the new value or min/max values (separated by a space) in chat.
{err_msg}

**⚙️ FILTER CONFIGURATION** Current value(s) of filter __{filter_name}__: **{param_val}**
__Accepted range:__ **{param_lim}**
Enter the new value or min/max values (separated by a space) in chat.
{err_msg}
❌ The inserted value is not valid.

**⚙️ USERS CONFIGURATION** Enter the usernames of the users to add, separated by a space.
**NOTE:** Usernames are not checked for existence
**⚙️ USERS CONFIGURATION** Enter the usernames of the users to remove, separated by a space:
**⚙️ USERS CONFIGURATION** ℹ️ The list of authorized users is empty.
**⚙️ USERS CONFIGURATION** ❌ One or more of the entered usernames are invalid.
**⚙️ USERS CONFIGURATION** ❌ One or more usernames were not found in the authorized users list.

**ℹ️ ABOUT BOT**
**Telegram Video Repurpose Bot**
• Author: __@emanueleb88__ • Version: __{version}__
**🎥 PROCESS VIDEO** To process a video, send the file in chat.
**ERROR** ❌ An unexpected error occurred while sending the video.
**ERROR** ❌ An unexpected error occurred while processing the video.
